subject: Pool Contractors
body:
Enclosed is a list of pool contractor contacts. Photos of projects of two of
the candidates can be obtained using the website references listed in the
attachment. Photos from the two Territorial contacts are supposedly being
sent on Monday or Tuesday.

 

A few generalizations:

 

1.       There is no true full service pool company in the Territory;
typically pools are build through a collaboration of a designer, the
construction contractor and a consultant, usually from off island

2.       We have had continuing contact with each of the companies  on the
list over the last 12 months with the exception of Mike Fuller; I have been
monitoring the Sussman situation through my son-in-law who is the
construction manager for his projects in St. John; Kashner and Rincon have
both met with us here in August

3.       Kashner was the initial preference because, at the time, everything
was rosy at Yacht Haven; I understand, however, that there were some
struggles there in getting that pool in

4.       Fuller does not advertise or promote himself, his a new name
surfaced in a casual conversation which I have with someone who is
appraising my house who once had a pool cleaning business; this contact may
be promising if the references which we are to receive check out

 

Lafayette Contractors, LLC

6100 Red Hook Quarters, Suite A2-7

St. Thomas, VI 00802

340 779-8054 (O)

340 779-8055 (FAX)

340 690-7194 (Cell)
body_html:
Enclosed is a list of pool contractor contacts. Photos of projects of two of the candidates can be obtained using the website references listed in the attachment. Photos from the two Territorial contacts are supposedly being sent on Monday or Tuesday.

 

A few generalizations:

 

1.       There is no true full service pool company in the Territory; typically pools are build through a collaboration of a designer, the construction contractor and a consultant, usually from off island

2.       We have had continuing contact with each of the companies  on the  list over the last 12 months with the exception of Mike Fuller; I have been monitoring the Sussman situation through my son-in-law who is the construction manager for his projects in St. John; Kashner and Rincon have both met with us here in August

3.       Kashner was the initial preference because, at the time, everything was rosy at Yacht Haven; I understand, however, that there were some struggles there in getting that pool in

4.       Fuller does not advertise or promote himself, his a new name surfaced in a casual conversation which I have with someone who is appraising my house who once had a pool cleaning business; this contact may be promising if the references which we are to receive check out

 

Lafayette Contractors, LLC

6100 Red Hook Quarters, Suite A2-7

St. Thomas, VI 00802

340 779-8054 (O)
